texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS AND CONDITIONS:
texts.text: TERMS AND CONDITIONS:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (1). A deposit of 80% of the quoted prices shall be paid upon confirmation in order to guarantee the bookings
texts.text: (1). A deposit of 80% of the quoted prices shall be paid upon confirmation in order to guarantee the bookings

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (2). The remaining 20% shall be paid at least 05 days prior to the convention of the event
texts.text: (2). The remaining 20% shall be paid at least 05 days prior to the convention of the event

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (3). Any extras incurred during the conference shall be paid prior to check out
texts.text: (3). Any extras incurred during the conference shall be paid prior to check out

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (4). List of participants is mandatory prior to group's arrival at the Lodge
texts.text: (4). List of participants is mandatory prior to group's arrival at the Lodge

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELATION POLICY:
texts.text: CANCELATION POLICY:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 15 -07 days from noon on the date of Check in 100% cancellation charge will apply.
texts.text: For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 15 -07 days from noon on the date of Check in 100% cancellation charge will apply.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. In case of cancellation less than 07 days from noon on the date of check in, or in case of No-show -100% of the net value of the booking shall be charged.
texts.text: In case of cancellation less than 07 days from noon on the date of check in, or in case of No-show -100% of the net value of the booking shall be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Cancellation or reduction in number once an LPO/voucher is issued, similar charges will apply as spelled in clause 1 & 2
texts.text: Cancellation or reduction in number once an LPO/voucher is issued, similar charges will apply as spelled in clause 1 & 2

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. In case guests fail to turn up in full as per the booking in this case 'No show' 100% as per contract (LPO)will be charged.
texts.text: In case guests fail to turn up in full as per the booking in this case 'No show' 100% as per contract (LPO)will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Incase guests decide to check out before their duration is over as per the LPO or contract, room charge will be charged in full for remaining subsequent days.
texts.text: Incase guests decide to check out before their duration is over as per the LPO or contract, room charge will be charged in full for remaining subsequent days.
